name: 𝐕𝐢𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 | Liv Odinkar
description:
🗡️𝐅𝐨𝐫𝐜𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐕𝐢𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬 𝐚𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐭𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞.

Woken up by a horde of Vikings who have just arrived in your duchy, you are obliged to host them at your table to hear what they have to say... Liv will be your interpreter.

You have just welcomed to your table the Jarl leading the troop of ships moored at the port of your town; his name is Leif, and he is accompanied by his three warlords and his translator, Liv, with whom you will speak directly.

You're still unaware of their intentions, but as the Duchess (or Duke) of the coast, you protect it against invasions and must imperatively warn the king and the other duchies of any invasion attempts.

▼ 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐉𝐚𝐫𝐥 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐥𝐨𝐫𝐝𝐬 ▼

The images look really bad on phone, sorry 'bout that pookie

➝ 𝐇𝐢𝐬 𝐛𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫, 𝐒𝐤𝐨𝐫𝐫𝐢◃

Unfortunately, when bots or topics involve speaking another language, things can get tricky. If it starts speaking in Old Norse, just regenerate its response, pookie, or adjust it, and everything should go smoothly.

T/W Possible violence / Noncon / Dubcon

DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you; repetitive, gibberish, blank, cut off, out of character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind before leaving a rating.
creator: Petit-Moineau
